message:
🐛 Address Copilot review findings from PRs #10070, #10068, #10064 (#10073)

Fixes #10072

- Stabilize isSnoozed/getSnoozedAlert refs with useCallback so
  downstream useMemo deps don't recompute every render
- Hoist NODE_HOSTNAME_PATTERN regex to module scope to avoid
  recompilation per extractHostname call
- Prefer injected s.registry over singleton GetRegistry() in
  handleGetKeys for test consistency
- Fix YAML indentation in nightly fallback comment body that
  rendered as a code block
- Fix stale budget comment (said 25, value is 30)
- Fix misleading "or update" comment on dedup logic that never updates

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>

files.patch:
@@ -244,10 +244,11 @@ jobs:
             gh issue comment "${{ steps.issue.outputs.issue_number }}" \
               --body-file /tmp/nightly-comparison.md
           else
-            gh issue comment "${{ steps.issue.outputs.issue_number }}" \
-              --body "## Nightly Test Suite — $(date -u +%Y-%m-%d)
+            FALLBACK_BODY="## Nightly Test Suite — $(date -u +%Y-%m-%d)
 
-          _No comparison report was generated. The test suite or comparison script may have failed. Check the [workflow run](${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}) for details._"
+_No comparison report was generated. The test suite or comparison script may have failed. Check the [workflow run](${{ github.server_url }}/${{ github.repository }}/actions/runs/${{ github.run_id }}) for details._"
+            gh issue comment "${{ steps.issue.outputs.issue_number }}" \
+              --body "$FALLBACK_BODY"
           fi
 
       - name: Create issues for failing suites
